steps: Add 18.4 g CaCl 2 *H 2 O to 500 mL Milli-Q H 2 O in a clean polyethylene bottle Calcium Chloride Contributed by users
Add 18.5 g MgSO 4 *7H 2 O to 500 mL Milli-Q H 2 O in a clean polyethylene bottle Magnesium sulfate heptahydrate Contributed by users
Add 6.3 g NaHCO 3 to 500 mL Milli-Q H 2 O in a clean polyethylene bottle Sodium bicarbonate P212121
Add 0.87 g K 2 HPO 4 to 500 mL Milli-Q H 2 O in a clean polyethylene bottle Potassium phosphate (dibasic) P212121
Add 4.25 g NaNO 3 to 500 mL Milli-Q H 2 O in a clean polyethylene bottle Sodium nitrate P212121
Add 443 mL Milli-Q H 2 O to a clean polyethylene container
Add 500 µL CuSO 4 *5H 2 O Copper Sulfate P212121
Add 500 µL (NH 4 ) 6 Mo 7 O 24 *4H 2 O Ammonium molybdate (VI) tetrahydrate Fisher Scientific Catalog #12054-85-2
Add 500 µL CoCl 2 *6H 2 O Cobalt (II) chloride hexahydrate Fisher Scientific Catalog #7791-13-1
Add 500 µL MnCl 2 *4H 2 O Manganese chloride Fisher Scientific Catalog #7773-01-5
Add 500 µL ZnSO 4 *7H 2 O Zinc sulfate Contributed by users
Add 5 mL Na 2 EDTA (0.5 M) EDTA Disodium Salt Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:8759
Add 50 mL FeCl 3 *7H 2 O Iron(III) chloride hexahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #44944
Add 1 L Milli-Q H 2 O to a clean bottle
Add 1 mL vitamin B 12 (1.0 g/L dH 2 O)
Add 10 mL Biotin (0.1 g/L dH 2 O) Biotin P212121
Add 200 mg Thiamine HCl Thiamine HCl P212121
Add 993 mL Milli-Q H 2 O to a clean polycarbonate bottle
Add 1 mL CaCl 2
Add 1 mL MgSO 4
Add 1 mL NaHCO 3
Add 1 mL K 2 HPO 4
Add 1 mL NaNO 3
Add 1 mL Trace metal mix
Add 1 mL f/2 vitamin mix
Filter sterilize and dispense into acid-washed/microwave tyndalized polycarbonate tubes.
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
